LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF JESSE GREENBERG'S MOTION TO FILE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF DID NOT SERVE AND FILE THE MOTION AT LEAST 16 COURT DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING, AS REQUIRED BY CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1005(B). IN ADDITION, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION DOES NOT COMPLY WITH THE REQUIREMENTS OF CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 3.1324. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

Motion To File 2nd Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-20-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF JESSE GREENBERG's Motion To File 2nd Amended Complaint is off calendar. Plaintiff did not serve and file the motion at least 16 court days before the hearing, as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b). In addition, plaintiff's motion does not comply with the requirements of California Rule of Court 3.1324.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-11-2018 Continued To Dec-04-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Jesse Greenberg, T:415.318.9537, plaintiff appearing on his own behalf;
Holly D. Coulehan, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, T:415.554.3828, for defendant/moving party.

RULING: The Court allowed defendant's counsel to examine plaintiff's medical document off the record. The matter was recalled. Pursuant to plaintiff's request,

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is CONTINUED to December 4, 2018 at 9:30 am. Plaintiff's opposition is due on 11/19/18; reply is due on 11/27/18. If plaintiff does not file an opposition, defendant's demurrer will be sustained without leave to amend.
